note: Same-link shell overlap is expected because generated meshes are cosmetic outer surfaces. Adjacent kinematic interfaces are reported separately from non-adjacent production clearance. Non-adjacent body clearance and joint sweep checks are hard gates for production fit. The primary MJCF keeps bodykit geoms visual-only; the collision-test MJCF enables contacts for MuJoCo inspection but uses unreduced cosmetic meshes, not final collision proxies. Production release still needs CAD boolean checks against final R1 CAD/scan.
